entries.note: "...I am your father." Hold that thought.
How he became the man in the mask.
Back to the present, payoff intact.
The classic cut drops it. Watch on its own if you like podracing.

summary: Rod Hilton's 2011 ordering: open in the original trilogy, flash back through the prequels at the perfect moment, then finish - so the Vader reveal still lands. Episode I is optional.
title: Machete Order
